title: Classical
description: Brings back the vibrancy of classic minecraft.
body:
Classical is a resource pack that gives the modern minecraft textures the colors of the classic minecraft textures. 

Most of the modified textures have been given adjustments to their saturation, contrast, and brightness to create a more vibrant scenery reminiscent of classic minecraft versions. This resource pack is not yet finished, but it still is a large improvement over the modern vanilla textures. 

Discord: https://discord.gg/HHqKa8vTAN
This mod may be used in any modpack.
